controls.accessibleName: ข้ามไปเนื้อหาหลัก / Skip to main content
controls.failureRecovery: main remains reachable by sequential keyboard navigation

controls.accessibleName: Landometer — กลับไปจุดเริ่มต้น / return to the start

controls.effect: local UI state plus URL and preference update
controls.finalState: Thai or English is the only visible locale
controls.failureRecovery: Thai fallback; session remains usable if storage fails
controls.browserTest: select with keyboard and pointer; reload URL

controls.finalState: Auto, Light, and Dark options visible
controls.failureRecovery: close with the same summary control

controls.accessibleName: อัตโนมัติ / รีเซ็ตธีม / Auto / reset theme
controls.effect: local theme state and preference storage
controls.failureRecovery: session theme still applies if storage fails
controls.browserTest: keyboard radio selection and system-emulation change

controls.effect: local theme state and preference storage
local theme state and preference storage

controls.accessibleName: คืนค่าธีมและภาษาเริ่มต้น / Reset theme and language
controls.job: remove explicit theme and locale preferences
controls.effect: clears only the documented local utility keys and URL locale choice
controls.finalState: Auto theme and browser/fallback locale active
controls.failureRecovery: current session remains usable if storage is unavailable
controls.browserTest: keyboard and pointer; verify URL and both utility keys

controls.accessibleName: เริ่มจากงานของฉัน / Start with my role
controls.job: move from the opening to the role proof
controls.failureRecovery: Try section remains reachable by scrolling

controls.accessibleName: ดูจากบทบาทของฉัน / View through my role
controls.browserTest: select every option with keyboard and pointer

controls.accessibleName: ก่อนใช้กติกากลาง / Baseline
controls.finalState: baseline proof visible with the invariant object
controls.browserTest: click, Enter, Space, and arrow key

controls.accessibleName: เมื่อใช้ v0.8.6 / With v0.8.6
controls.finalState: assisted proof visible with the invariant object
controls.browserTest: click, Enter, Space, and arrow key

controls.accessibleName: ดูสิ่งที่ต้องตรวจต่อ / Show the next checks
controls.finalState: checklist shown or hidden and announced
controls.failureRecovery: same control toggles state; no-JS shows the checklist and hides the control

controls.accessibleName: ถ้าหลักฐานหาย งานจะหยุดตรงไหน? / Where does work stop when evidence is missing?
พิจารณาอนุมัติทิศทาง + pilot 2 สัปดาห์ / Consider the direction + a two-week pilot
controls.job: review the exact Gate A decision request
controls.effect: local disclosure; approval is not recorded or transmitted
controls.finalState: decision, role actions, Gate B, and static takeaway visible
controls.browserTest: pointer and keyboard; verify focus and aria-expanded
